TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lenlen a kimad no Tao finacadan == Lenlen a kimad no Tao finacadan, nawhani ci'ilo ko finawlan no Tao, saka ira ko 10 mihecaan ko halafin no kalenlen, saka mafades ko finawlan no Tao, mangatangata to matekop ko finawlan. Kalosowal Pakayraan no demak O sowal i 'a:yaw i, ira ko cipoyapoyay fafahiyan no Jimorod niyaro', tayra i riyar a mikilim to sakakomaen ato mikilim to kakaenen, mifelin to raka saka ci'ilo, marketer ko kawas no kakarayan saka cirangod ko riyar a malenlen ko niyaro' no Tao finacadan, nika ira ko rama a sowal paretatenga to nika katayra aca noya cipoyapoyay fafahiyan a miradom ano eca mirarakat, manengneng ko riyar a makerah, saka nawiro matira saan ko nengneng ta ira aca ko rangod a miraod, ano eca o nano piwanik noya cipoyapoyay a fafahiyan to raka itiya, saka nai lalinikay no nanom a dihif masadak ko nanom ko kasamatira . Kalenlenan a romi'ad Tona ira koya rangod ato lenlen itiya i, oya mafadocay finawlan milaliw to tayra i Jipeygangen a lotok, (roma a sowal Iitira i Dsipiganin ato Dsitsakalman lotok, ano eca Di-kamioron ato Di-karurinam), nawhani o kalopinanowang maemin to ma'alol a mapatay. Padoedo to pinapina miheca ko kalenlen, tangasa i saka 8 miheca itiya, manengneng to i kilakilang ko cekiw . Kakerah to no nanom Tangasa to i saka 9 miheca i, ira ko tamdaw (sasowalen oya pakalenlenay cipoyapoyay fafahiyan) marepet ko cecay a 'edo, ta docohen ningra ko wikol noya 'edo, ta milongoc cingra to kakerah no nanom tangasa i katefadan noya wikol saan, saka tekolen to ningra itiya, nanoyaan sa miteka to makerah koya lenlen, tangasa i saka 10 miheca, malokelon to nai lotok ko finawlan tayra i enar, nanoyaan sato koya cipoyapoyay a fafahiya a masofoc to wawa no niyah . Paikoray Makerah koya lenlen i, kacango'ot to no kakaenen, dengan o rengos ko nikaenan no finawlan itiya, tangasa ira ko pakakilimay to tali, saka itira to cangra i cinanomay a facal mipaloma toya tali a makapah ko lengaw, saka ira to ko kakaenen mafecol to ko finawlan, orasaka o tali ko nikaenan nano to'as tahanini , ikor no lenlen to saka cecay miheca macowat to ko kadofahay a tali; saka 2, 3 mihecaan ira to molengaw ko aol; ikor no 14 miheca ira ko karakarat manengneng, ira to i lotolotokan ko kilakilang a lomengaw . Roma a tilid Ira ko roma tilid to pakayniay lenlen a kimad adihay ko caayay kalecad no kimad: Pakayraan no demak Ira ko tilid, paretatenga to lalengatan no lenlen nawhani malenak to ko finawlan no Tao itini i Fotod kanatal to ikor i, misatapang ko finawlan to nikaeca kangodo to kawas saka marketer ko kawas , ano eca o nano kasasiwtoc a malalood ko kasamatira , o sowal no Jimawawa niyaro' cimangilosay ko tamdaw no kanatal, awaayto ko masasingodoay pinangan, ano eca o i Jimawawa niyaro' a tamdaw misamsam mifades to tamdaw saka tefocen to no kakarayanay kawas . Dadoedo no ikoray Ikor no kalasawad no lenlen i, ira ko rama a sowal paretatenga o maeminay mapatay ko tamdaw no sekal, manengneng no kakarayan a kawas ko mapa'oripay tamdaw no Fotod kanatal, masafa'eloh nengnengen, tefaden ko cecay a fakeloh, nanoyaan sa masadak ko nai fakelohay masadak tato'asan no Tao finacadan, oya lomengaway a aol itira masadak ko aol tamdaw a tato'asan, nanoyaan sa malenak ko tamdaw itini i kanatal, nika ira ko sowal paretatenga cangra tatrosa oya mafadocay tatosa saan , ano eca o kaira naira tatosa ta ira ko lenlen saan , itiya dengan i sa'amisan no Fotod a ira ko maro'ay tamdaw, katimol away ko maro'ay tomdaw, orasaka pakalinahen no kakarayan kawas cangra tatosa talatimol a milenak to teloc sa ko sowal . Pinengnengan to tilid 1. (1998-12-01)ISBN 9789570231410 ‧故事全集(1)(2001-05-07)ISBN 9576224284 3.達悟族神話與傳說(2003-09-01)ISBN 9574554791存檔 4.原語による台灣高砂族傳說集(2021-08-09)ISBN 9789576383045原始內容
S.PHON: == ɾənɾən a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan == ɾənɾən a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nawħani ʦiʡiɾo~u ko~u finawɾan no~u tao~u, saka ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan ko~u ħaɾafin no~u kaɾənɾən, saka mafaɬ~ɮəs ko~u finawɾan no~u tao~u, maŋataŋata to~u matəko~up ko~u finawɾan. kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ pakajraan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak o~u so~uwaɾ i ʡa:jaw i, ira ko~u ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj fafaħijan no~u *imo~uro~uɬ~ɮ nijaro~uʡ, tajra i rijar a mikiɾim to~u sakako~umaən ato~u mikiɾim to~u kakaənən, mifəɾin to~u raka saka ʦiʡiɾo~u, markətər ko~u kawas no~u kakarajan saka ʦiraŋo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u rijar a maɾənɾən ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ira ko~u rama a so~uwaɾ parətatəŋa to~u nika katajra aʦa no~uja ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj fafaħijan a miraɬ~ɮo~um ano~u əʦa mirarakat, manəŋnəŋ ko~u rijar a makəraħ, saka nawiro~u matira saan ko~u nəŋnəŋ ta ira aʦa ko~u raŋo~uɬ~ɮ a mirao~uɬ~ɮ, ano~u əʦa o~u nano~u piwanik no~uja ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj a fafaħijan to~u raka itija, saka nai ɾaɾinikaj no~u nano~um a ɬ~ɮiħif masaɬ~ɮak ko~u nano~um ko~u kasamatira . kaɾənɾənan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~una ira ko~uja raŋo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u ɾənɾən itija i, o~uja mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj finawɾan miɾaɾiw to~u tajra i *ipəj*aŋən a ɾo~uto~uk, (ro~uma a so~uwaɾ iitira i ɬ~ɮsipi*anin ato~u ɬ~ɮsitsakaɾman ɾo~uto~uk, ano~u əʦa ɬ~ɮi-kamio~uro~un ato~u ɬ~ɮi-karo~u~urinam), nawħani o~u kaɾo~upinano~uwaŋ maəmin to~u maʡaɾo~uɾ a mapataj. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u pinapina miħəʦa ko~u kaɾənɾən, taŋasa i saka * miħəʦa itija, manəŋnəŋ to~u i kiɾakiɾaŋ ko~u ʦəkiw . kakəraħ to~u no~u nano~um taŋasa to~u i saka * miħəʦa i, ira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw (saso~uwaɾən o~uja pakaɾənɾənaj ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj fafaħijan) marəpət ko~u ʦəʦaj a ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, ta ɬ~ɮo~uʦo~uħən niŋra ko~u wiko~uɾ no~uja ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, ta miɾo~uŋo~uʦ ʦiŋra to~u kakəraħ no~u nano~um taŋasa i katəfaɬ~ɮan no~uja wiko~uɾ saan, saka təko~uɾən to~u niŋra itija, nano~ujaan sa mitəka to~u makəraħ ko~uja ɾənɾən, taŋasa i saka ** miħəʦa, maɾo~ukəɾo~un to~u nai ɾo~uto~uk ko~u finawɾan tajra i ənar, nano~ujaan sato~u ko~uja ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj a fafaħija a maso~ufo~uʦ to~u wawa no~u nijaħ . paiko~uraj makəraħ ko~uja ɾənɾən i, kaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut to~u no~u kakaənən, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u rəŋo~us ko~u nikaənan no~u finawɾan itija, taŋasa ira ko~u pakakiɾimaj to~u taɾi, saka itira to~u ʦaŋra i ʦinano~umaj a faʦaɾ mipaɾo~uma to~uja taɾi a makapaħ ko~u ɾəŋaw, saka ira to~u ko~u kakaənən mafəʦo~uɾ to~u ko~u finawɾan, o~urasaka o~u taɾi ko~u nikaənan nano~u to~uʡas taħanini , iko~ur no~u ɾənɾən to~u saka ʦəʦaj miħəʦa maʦo~uwat to~u ko~u kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħaj a taɾi; saka *, * miħəʦaan ira to~u mo~uɾəŋaw ko~u ao~uɾ; iko~ur no~u ** miħəʦa ira ko~u karakarat manəŋnəŋ, ira to~u i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan ko~u kiɾakiɾaŋ a ɾo~uməŋaw . ro~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ira ko~u ro~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniaj ɾənɾən a kimaɬ~ɮ aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ʦaajaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ no~u kimaɬ~ɮ: pakajraan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak ira ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, parətatəŋa to~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u ɾənɾən nawħani maɾənak to~u ko~u finawɾan no~u tao~u itini i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ kanataɾ to~u iko~ur i, misatapaŋ ko~u finawɾan to~u nikaəʦa kaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u kawas saka markətər ko~u kawas , ano~u əʦa o~u nano~u kasasiwto~uʦ a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kasamatira , o~u so~uwaɾ no~u *imawawa nijaro~uʡ ʦimaŋiɾo~usaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kanataɾ, awaajto~u ko~u masasiŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj pinaŋan, ano~u əʦa o~u i *imawawa nijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw misamsam mifaɬ~ɮəs to~u tamɬ~ɮaw saka təfo~uʦən to~u no~u kakarajanaj kawas . ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u iko~uraj iko~ur no~u kaɾasawaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾənɾən i, ira ko~u rama a so~uwaɾ parətatəŋa o~u maəminaj mapataj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u səkaɾ, manəŋnəŋ no~u kakarajan a kawas ko~u mapaʡo~uripaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, masafaʡəɾo~uħ nəŋnəŋən, təfaɬ~ɮən ko~u ʦəʦaj a fakəɾo~uħ, nano~ujaan sa masaɬ~ɮak ko~u nai fakəɾo~uħaj masaɬ~ɮak tato~uʡasan no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~uja ɾo~uməŋawaj a ao~uɾ itira masaɬ~ɮak ko~u ao~uɾ tamɬ~ɮaw a tato~uʡasan, nano~ujaan sa maɾənak ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw itini i kanataɾ, nika ira ko~u so~uwaɾ parətatəŋa ʦaŋra tatro~usa o~uja mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj tato~usa saan , ano~u əʦa o~u kaira naira tato~usa ta ira ko~u ɾənɾən saan , itija ɬ~ɮəŋan i saʡamisan no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ a ira ko~u maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw, katimo~uɾ awaj ko~u maro~uʡaj to~umɬ~ɮaw, o~urasaka pakaɾinaħən no~u kakarajan kawas ʦaŋra tato~usa taɾatimo~uɾ a miɾənak to~u təɾo~uʦ sa ko~u so~uwaɾ . pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. (****-**-**)isb~b~vn ************* *****(*)(****-**-**)isb~b~vn ********** *.********(****-**-**)isb~b~vn ************ *.*************(****-**-**)isb~b~vn *****************
S.FORM: == Lenlen a kimad no Tao finacadan == Lenlen a kimad no Tao finacadan, nawhani ci'ilo ko finawlan no Tao, saka ira ko 10 mihecaan ko halafin no kalenlen, saka mafades ko finawlan no Tao, mangatangata to matekop ko finawlan. Kalosowal Pakayraan no demak O sowal i 'a:yaw i, ira ko cipoyapoyay fafahiyan no Jimorod niyaro', tayra i riyar a mikilim to sakakomaen ato mikilim to kakaenen, mifelin to raka saka ci'ilo, marketer ko kawas no kakarayan saka cirangod ko riyar a malenlen ko niyaro' no Tao finacadan, nika ira ko rama a sowal paretatenga to nika katayra aca noya cipoyapoyay fafahiyan a miradom ano eca mirarakat, manengneng ko riyar a makerah, saka nawiro matira saan ko nengneng ta ira aca ko rangod a miraod, ano eca o nano piwanik noya cipoyapoyay a fafahiyan to raka itiya, saka nai lalinikay no nanom a dihif masadak ko nanom ko kasamatira . Kalenlenan a romi'ad Tona ira koya rangod ato lenlen itiya i, oya mafadocay finawlan milaliw to tayra i Jipeygangen a lotok, (roma a sowal Iitira i Dsipiganin ato Dsitsakalman lotok, ano eca Di-kamioron ato Di-karurinam), nawhani o kalopinanowang maemin to ma'alol a mapatay. Padoedo to pinapina miheca ko kalenlen, tangasa i saka 8 miheca itiya, manengneng to i kilakilang ko cekiw . Kakerah to no nanom Tangasa to i saka 9 miheca i, ira ko tamdaw (sasowalen oya pakalenlenay cipoyapoyay fafahiyan) marepet ko cecay a 'edo, ta docohen ningra ko wikol noya 'edo, ta milongoc cingra to kakerah no nanom tangasa i katefadan noya wikol saan, saka tekolen to ningra itiya, nanoyaan sa miteka to makerah koya lenlen, tangasa i saka 10 miheca, malokelon to nai lotok ko finawlan tayra i enar, nanoyaan sato koya cipoyapoyay a fafahiya a masofoc to wawa no niyah . Paikoray Makerah koya lenlen i, kacango'ot to no kakaenen, dengan o rengos ko nikaenan no finawlan itiya, tangasa ira ko pakakilimay to tali, saka itira to cangra i cinanomay a facal mipaloma toya tali a makapah ko lengaw, saka ira to ko kakaenen mafecol to ko finawlan, orasaka o tali ko nikaenan nano to'as tahanini , ikor no lenlen to saka cecay miheca macowat to ko kadofahay a tali; saka 2, 3 mihecaan ira to molengaw ko aol; ikor no 14 miheca ira ko karakarat manengneng, ira to i lotolotokan ko kilakilang a lomengaw . Roma a tilid Ira ko roma tilid to pakayniay lenlen a kimad adihay ko caayay kalecad no kimad: Pakayraan no demak Ira ko tilid, paretatenga to lalengatan no lenlen nawhani malenak to ko finawlan no Tao itini i Fotod kanatal to ikor i, misatapang ko finawlan to nikaeca kangodo to kawas saka marketer ko kawas , ano eca o nano kasasiwtoc a malalood ko kasamatira , o sowal no Jimawawa niyaro' cimangilosay ko tamdaw no kanatal, awaayto ko masasingodoay pinangan, ano eca o i Jimawawa niyaro' a tamdaw misamsam mifades to tamdaw saka tefocen to no kakarayanay kawas . Dadoedo no ikoray Ikor no kalasawad no lenlen i, ira ko rama a sowal paretatenga o maeminay mapatay ko tamdaw no sekal, manengneng no kakarayan a kawas ko mapa'oripay tamdaw no Fotod kanatal, masafa'eloh nengnengen, tefaden ko cecay a fakeloh, nanoyaan sa masadak ko nai fakelohay masadak tato'asan no Tao finacadan, oya lomengaway a aol itira masadak ko aol tamdaw a tato'asan, nanoyaan sa malenak ko tamdaw itini i kanatal, nika ira ko sowal paretatenga cangra tatrosa oya mafadocay tatosa saan , ano eca o kaira naira tatosa ta ira ko lenlen saan , itiya dengan i sa'amisan no Fotod a ira ko maro'ay tamdaw, katimol away ko maro'ay tomdaw, orasaka pakalinahen no kakarayan kawas cangra tatosa talatimol a milenak to teloc sa ko sowal . Pinengnengan to tilid 1. (1998-12-01)ISBN 9789570231410 ‧故事全集(1)(2001-05-07)ISBN 9576224284 3.達悟族神話與傳說(2003-09-01)ISBN 9574554791存檔 4.原語による台灣高砂族傳說集(2021-08-09)ISBN 9789576383045原始內容
S.PHON: == ɾənɾən a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan == ɾənɾən a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nawħani ʦiʡiɾo~u ko~u finawɾan no~u tao~u, saka ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan ko~u ħaɾafin no~u kaɾənɾən, saka mafaɬ~ɮəs ko~u finawɾan no~u tao~u, maŋataŋata to~u matəko~up ko~u finawɾan. kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ pakajraan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak o~u so~uwaɾ i ʡa:jaw i, ira ko~u ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj fafaħijan no~u *imo~uro~uɬ~ɮ nijaro~uʡ, tajra i rijar a mikiɾim to~u sakako~umaən ato~u mikiɾim to~u kakaənən, mifəɾin to~u raka saka ʦiʡiɾo~u, markətər ko~u kawas no~u kakarajan saka ʦiraŋo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u rijar a maɾənɾən ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ira ko~u rama a so~uwaɾ parətatəŋa to~u nika katajra aʦa no~uja ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj fafaħijan a miraɬ~ɮo~um ano~u əʦa mirarakat, manəŋnəŋ ko~u rijar a makəraħ, saka nawiro~u matira saan ko~u nəŋnəŋ ta ira aʦa ko~u raŋo~uɬ~ɮ a mirao~uɬ~ɮ, ano~u əʦa o~u nano~u piwanik no~uja ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj a fafaħijan to~u raka itija, saka nai ɾaɾinikaj no~u nano~um a ɬ~ɮiħif masaɬ~ɮak ko~u nano~um ko~u kasamatira . kaɾənɾənan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~una ira ko~uja raŋo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u ɾənɾən itija i, o~uja mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj finawɾan miɾaɾiw to~u tajra i *ipəj*aŋən a ɾo~uto~uk, (ro~uma a so~uwaɾ iitira i ɬ~ɮsipi*anin ato~u ɬ~ɮsitsakaɾman ɾo~uto~uk, ano~u əʦa ɬ~ɮi-kamio~uro~un ato~u ɬ~ɮi-karo~u~urinam), nawħani o~u kaɾo~upinano~uwaŋ maəmin to~u maʡaɾo~uɾ a mapataj. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u pinapina miħəʦa ko~u kaɾənɾən, taŋasa i saka * miħəʦa itija, manəŋnəŋ to~u i kiɾakiɾaŋ ko~u ʦəkiw . kakəraħ to~u no~u nano~um taŋasa to~u i saka * miħəʦa i, ira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw (saso~uwaɾən o~uja pakaɾənɾənaj ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj fafaħijan) marəpət ko~u ʦəʦaj a ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, ta ɬ~ɮo~uʦo~uħən niŋra ko~u wiko~uɾ no~uja ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, ta miɾo~uŋo~uʦ ʦiŋra to~u kakəraħ no~u nano~um taŋasa i katəfaɬ~ɮan no~uja wiko~uɾ saan, saka təko~uɾən to~u niŋra itija, nano~ujaan sa mitəka to~u makəraħ ko~uja ɾənɾən, taŋasa i saka ** miħəʦa, maɾo~ukəɾo~un to~u nai ɾo~uto~uk ko~u finawɾan tajra i ənar, nano~ujaan sato~u ko~uja ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj a fafaħija a maso~ufo~uʦ to~u wawa no~u nijaħ . paiko~uraj makəraħ ko~uja ɾənɾən i, kaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut to~u no~u kakaənən, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u rəŋo~us ko~u nikaənan no~u finawɾan itija, taŋasa ira ko~u pakakiɾimaj to~u taɾi, saka itira to~u ʦaŋra i ʦinano~umaj a faʦaɾ mipaɾo~uma to~uja taɾi a makapaħ ko~u ɾəŋaw, saka ira to~u ko~u kakaənən mafəʦo~uɾ to~u ko~u finawɾan, o~urasaka o~u taɾi ko~u nikaənan nano~u to~uʡas taħanini , iko~ur no~u ɾənɾən to~u saka ʦəʦaj miħəʦa maʦo~uwat to~u ko~u kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħaj a taɾi; saka *, * miħəʦaan ira to~u mo~uɾəŋaw ko~u ao~uɾ; iko~ur no~u ** miħəʦa ira ko~u karakarat manəŋnəŋ, ira to~u i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan ko~u kiɾakiɾaŋ a ɾo~uməŋaw . ro~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ira ko~u ro~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniaj ɾənɾən a kimaɬ~ɮ aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ʦaajaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ no~u kimaɬ~ɮ: pakajraan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak ira ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, parətatəŋa to~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u ɾənɾən nawħani maɾənak to~u ko~u finawɾan no~u tao~u itini i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ kanataɾ to~u iko~ur i, misatapaŋ ko~u finawɾan to~u nikaəʦa kaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u kawas saka markətər ko~u kawas , ano~u əʦa o~u nano~u kasasiwto~uʦ a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kasamatira , o~u so~uwaɾ no~u *imawawa nijaro~uʡ ʦimaŋiɾo~usaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kanataɾ, awaajto~u ko~u masasiŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj pinaŋan, ano~u əʦa o~u i *imawawa nijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw misamsam mifaɬ~ɮəs to~u tamɬ~ɮaw saka təfo~uʦən to~u no~u kakarajanaj kawas . ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u iko~uraj iko~ur no~u kaɾasawaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾənɾən i, ira ko~u rama a so~uwaɾ parətatəŋa o~u maəminaj mapataj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u səkaɾ, manəŋnəŋ no~u kakarajan a kawas ko~u mapaʡo~uripaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, masafaʡəɾo~uħ nəŋnəŋən, təfaɬ~ɮən ko~u ʦəʦaj a fakəɾo~uħ, nano~ujaan sa masaɬ~ɮak ko~u nai fakəɾo~uħaj masaɬ~ɮak tato~uʡasan no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~uja ɾo~uməŋawaj a ao~uɾ itira masaɬ~ɮak ko~u ao~uɾ tamɬ~ɮaw a tato~uʡasan, nano~ujaan sa maɾənak ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw itini i kanataɾ, nika ira ko~u so~uwaɾ parətatəŋa ʦaŋra tatro~usa o~uja mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj tato~usa saan , ano~u əʦa o~u kaira naira tato~usa ta ira ko~u ɾənɾən saan , itija ɬ~ɮəŋan i saʡamisan no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ a ira ko~u maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw, katimo~uɾ awaj ko~u maro~uʡaj to~umɬ~ɮaw, o~urasaka pakaɾinaħən no~u kakarajan kawas ʦaŋra tato~usa taɾatimo~uɾ a miɾənak to~u təɾo~uʦ sa ko~u so~uwaɾ . pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. (****-**-**)isb~b~vn ************* *****(*)(****-**-**)isb~b~vn ********** *.********(****-**-**)isb~b~vn ************ *.*************(****-**-**)isb~b~vn *****************
